reviews.comment:
No permiten pasar la noche en el playón, con un motorhome,  mediano. Aclaro que no soy socio del ACA, tuve que seguir hasta las Armas , estación SELL

(Translated by Google)
They don't allow overnight stays in the parking area with a medium-sized motorhome. I should clarify that I'm not an ACA member; I had to continue on to Las Armas, the SELL gas station.
